title: Relay Ledger Loader
prompt:
Create a production-ready Relay Ledger Loader using TypeScript React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. This original loader turns a three-step export process into a quiet vertical ledger: Prepare, Package, and Deliver. A single cyan marker relays between the rows while accessible text states the current checkpoint. Keep the component inside a white 22px Bento card on #F4F5F6 with #ECECEE borders, a soft neutral shadow, #111111 text, and #4A4A4F support copy. Use cyan as the only bright accent and do not apply gradients to the card.

This is intentionally a loader, so an ambient loop is permitted. Move the marker through the three rows with a 1.8 second linear sequence and an approximately 300/26 spring between checkpoints; never use JavaScript timers. Provide a meaningful static first checkpoint for server rendering, role=status, aria-live=polite, and readable text such as Preparing export. Decorative markers must be aria-hidden. Use transform and opacity rather than layout thrashing. Do not use random values, storage, network activity, remote images, or dynamic code.

The loader must work in a compact card from 320px upward and scale naturally in a detail preview. Maintain AA contrast, a clear heading, and no interaction requirement. For prefers-reduced-motion, stop the loop on the first stable checkpoint while retaining the text status. Return complete client component code and a pure CSS approximation with suggested HTML; the CSS version may use keyframes but must disable them for reduced motion.

code.css:
/* HTML:
Prepare
*/ .relay-ledger-loader{max-width:340px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff;color:#111}.relay-ledger-loader i{display:inline-block;width:12px;height:12px;margin-right:12px;border-radius:50%;background:#38bdf8;animation:relay-ledger 1.8s linear infinite}.relay-ledger-loader i:nth-of-type(2){animation-delay:.6s}.relay-ledger-loader i:nth-of-type(3){animation-delay:1.2s}@keyframes relay-ledger{0%,100%{opacity:.25;transform:scale(.8)}50%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.relay-ledger-loader i{animation:none;opacity:.25}.relay-ledger-loader i:first-child{opacity:1}}
